category_sources: source_facts.description says collection of on-chip debugging tools for microchips; official probe-rs docs describe embedded debugging and target interaction.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is probe-rs-tools; official installation docs reference installing probe-rs-tools from the probe-rs repository.
docs_sources: Official probe.rs documentation has general docs and a dedicated probe-rs CLI utility page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/probe-rs/probe-rs, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists cargo-embed, cargo-flash, and probe-rs; official docs describe flashing firmware, debugging microcontrollers, and the probe-rs CLI.
